case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SERGIO ROLANDO QUINTAL MOO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED NOV-12-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTAL MOO, SERGIO ROLANDO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTSERGIO ROLANDO MOO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFFS. REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED ORDER)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION: DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO JAN-14-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES THAT PROVIDED A WORKING PHONE NUMBER HAVE BEEN ADVISE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
